summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Thryve Coworking Management System UI restructure. All features working correctly: Landing page is Member Portal, Admin at /admin/*, booking rules (10 AM-6 PM slots, 10-day advance, 2-day cancel), multi-slot selection.

issues: Legacy booking from 09:00-09:30 still visible in bookings list (created before 10 AM rule). This is expected behavior - old bookings are preserved.

passed_tests: Landing page (/) - Shows Member Portal login with Login/Register tabs
Landing page - Admin Login badge in bottom left corner (links to /admin/login)
Admin Login (/admin/login) - Shows Admin Panel login with Admin Login badge
Admin Login - Back to Member Portal link present
Admin routing - Room Bookings navigation works (/admin/bookings)
Admin routing - Support Tickets navigation works (/admin/tickets)
Admin routing - Create Invoice navigation works (/admin/create-invoice)
Booking slots - 10 AM to 6 PM only (verified via API and UI)
Multi-slot selection - Members can select multiple consecutive slots
Booking advance limit - Can only book up to 10 days in advance (API rejects 15-day booking)
Booking cancellation - Can only cancel 2+ days before the event
Member Portal at /portal/* - Login, Dashboard, Bookings all working
Member Portal booking slots - Shows 10 AM to 6 PM slots
critical_code_review_comments: All routing correctly implemented with /admin prefix for admin routes
Member Portal correctly set as landing page (/)
Booking rules (10-day advance, 2-day cancel) properly enforced in backend API
Multi-slot selection working with consecutive slot validation
Both login pages have matching badges (Admin Login left, Emergent right)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test member 'Test Member Portal' (testmember@thryve.in)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI restructure verified: 1) Landing page (/) is now Member Portal login. 2) Admin routes moved to /admin/*. 3) Booking rules: 10 AM-6 PM slots, max 10 days advance, min 2 days before cancellation. 4) Multi-slot selection works for consecutive slots. All sidebar navigation uses relative paths and works correctly.
